tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: MS Dhoni is one of the most successful captains in cricket history and led India to several major international titles.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He captained India to the ICC T20 World Cup 2007, ICC Cricket World Cup 2011 and ICC Champions Trophy 2013.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Dhoni is famous for his helicopter shot and calm leadership under pressure.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Virat Kohli is considered one of the best modern batsmen in world cricket.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He has scored more than 25,000 international runs across all formats.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Kohli is known for chasing targets and maintaining one of the highest batting averages in ODI cricket.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Rohit Sharma is one of the most elegant opening batsmen in modern cricket.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He holds the record for the highest individual score in ODI cricket with 264 runs.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Rohit has scored multiple double centuries in One Day Internationals.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Jasprit Bumrah is one of the most dangerous fast bowlers in world cricket.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He has taken match winning wickets for India in all formats including Test cricket.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Bumrah is known for his deadly yorkers and unusual bowling action.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: KL Rahul is a stylish batsman capable of playing in multiple batting positions.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He has scored centuries in all three formats of international cricket.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Rahul has also captained India in several international matches.
